applicant_personal_information.occupation_employer: Senior Mechanical Engineer, Gateway Industrial Solutions, Inc.

survivor__next_of_kin_information.relationship: Spouse (Wife) - primary contact and next of kin for all membership and insurance-related matters; has full knowledge of my involvement with the parish, my work schedule, and extended family situation, and is comfortable communicating with church and council representatives if anything were to happen to me.

religious__parish_information.parish_name_location_city_st_prov: St. Mary Magdalene Catholic Church, St. Louis, MO – I attend Sunday Mass regularly with my family (typically the 9:30 AM Mass), Holy Days of Obligation, and try to attend weekday Mass roughly once a week when my work schedule allows. I go to confession approximately once a month, volunteer with the parish men’s group and fall festival, and my children are enrolled in the parish school and PSR programs. I was confirmed in this parish in 2002 after moving from Texas, and our family is registered and receives envelopes and parish communications at our Oak Crest Drive address.

signatures__approvals.signature_of_applicant: Daniel A. Martinez – By signing, I affirm that I am a practical Catholic in union with the Holy See to the best of my understanding and that the information provided here is accurate and complete, including my family, parish involvement, and contact details.
